name: runner-lens
description: Zero-config observability for GitHub Actions runners

scripts.build: npm run bundle:main && npm run bundle:post
scripts.bundle:post: esbuild src/post.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --outfile=dist/post/index.js --minify --sourcemap --external:@resvg/resvg-wasm && rm -rf dist/post/node_modules && mkdir -p dist/post/node_modules/@resvg && cp -r node_modules/@resvg/resvg-wasm dist/post/node_modules/@resvg/resvg-wasm
